channel.title: Media Library Blog
channel.description: A simple blog discussing the steps in building a media library.

item.title: Getting Started
item.description: I recently started a new, public project and want to showcase the progress and the results. This project illustrates the technology I use…
item.content:encoded:
I recently started a new, public project and want to showcase the progress and the results.

This project illustrates the technology I use creating applications. It further illustrates the choices that I make when building an application.
